findings.summary: Conditional freeze semantics conflict with the source authority's arbitration model and acceptance authority.
findings.redesignGuidance: Make `frozen_with_conditions` a review-result state that cannot bypass a `reject` verdict. Require explicit invoker acceptance before canonical promotion of any conditionally accepted package.

findings.summary: Canonical and run-scoped authority/lifecycle boundaries are not kept cleanly separate.
findings.redesignGuidance: Keep the durable role definition generic and stable. Refer to governance inputs through stable component paths or runtime placeholders, and describe validation-run targets as invocation-bound outputs rather than as the durable canonical root.

findings.summary: Cross-round finding tracking is anchored to conceptual groups instead of stable finding identifiers.
findings.redesignGuidance: Carry unresolved findings forward by stable finding ID, with conceptual-group ID kept only as secondary grouping metadata. Resume packages, fix-items maps, and later-round review inputs should all reference the same unresolved finding IDs.

findings.summary: The self-check still equates semantic coverage with lexical keyword matching.
findings.redesignGuidance: Do not label keyword matching as semantic validation. Either downgrade it to a lexical heuristic in the self-check contract or add a real semantic review step whose evidence standard matches the claim.

unresolved: group-1: Conditional freeze semantics conflict with the source authority's arbitration model and acceptance authority.
group-2: Canonical and run-scoped authority/lifecycle boundaries are not kept cleanly separate.
group-3: Cross-round finding tracking is anchored to conceptual groups instead of stable finding identifiers.
group-4: The self-check still equates semantic coverage with lexical keyword matching.
leader_rationale:
Repair work is still required. The draft is materially stronger on authority ordering, preconditions, evidence layout, and decision-history preservation, but it still diverges from the source authority on conditional-freeze authority, budget-exhaustion handling, request-time reviewer-roster gating, per-finding carry-forward semantics, and self-check credibility. Those are material governance semantics, not minor polish.
Convergence trend: 4 -> 4 issues. NOT CONVERGING - apply all fixes precisely this round.
